experience.title: Transformer Maintenance Management App (Industry-Sponsored Project)
responsibilities: Built an industry-sponsored asset tracking application using Flutter, applying object-oriented Dart principles to manage application state and digitize complex field workflows.
Orchestrated asynchronous data synchronization with Cloud Firestore to handle real-time location tracking, maintenance logs, and enforce strict role-based access rules.

experience.title: Sponsorship Secretary
responsibilities: Spearheaded negotiations to secure corporate backing for technical events.
Cultivated industry partnerships to drive resources for student initiatives.

projects.title: AI Proctored Online Examination System
projects.description: Engineered an event-driven backend architecture using WebSockets, integrating TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe to automate real-time monitoring and manage concurrent user sessions. Structured scalable MongoDB collections to handle high-frequency data operations, ensuring reliable state logging, accurate live timers, and automated submission workflows.

projects.title: Cab Booking Platform
projects.description: Engineered the backend logic and relational database schemas for a ride-booking system to efficiently map, store, and query complex data flows between user requests, vehicles, and driver availability. Implemented secure REST APIs and WebSocket connections to handle continuous data streaming, active ride tracking, and asynchronous event synchronization.

projects.title: Nifty Market Trend Predictor
projects.description: Architected a time-series forecasting pipeline using LSTM and ensemble networks, implementing robust TimeSeriesSplit logic to manage complex sequential arrays and prevent data leakage. Optimized algorithmic performance for highly imbalanced datasets using AdaBoost to capture rare minority class events, achieving a 93.73% cross-validation directional accuracy.

projects.title: EchoSoul Project (Hackathon Finalist)
projects.description: Architected a client-server application, integrating a Python/ FastAPI backend with a Node.js frontend to dynamically generate custom Al personality profiles. Engineered complex data workflows to process file uploads, manage asynchronous Google Gemini API calls, and execute text-to-speech audio conversions.
